items.title: Undo history
items.scenario: A prompt editor lets users undo each text change.
items.explanation: Push each change onto a stack; pop on Ctrl-Z. Latest change is naturally the first to revert.

items.title: Streaming buffer with backpressure
items.scenario: Tokens arrive faster than the UI can render them.
items.explanation: Enqueue tokens; the renderer dequeues in order. FIFO preserves the chronological order the user expects.

items.title: Worker pool for embeddings
items.scenario: Many documents need embedding; you want N workers processing in arrival order.
items.explanation: A queue feeds workers; each pops the next job. FIFO ensures fairness across submitters.

items.title: BFS over a knowledge graph
items.scenario: Walk a graph of related entities, level by level, from a seed node.
items.explanation: Breadth-first search uses a queue; depth-first search would use a stack instead.

items.title: Top-k retrieval
items.scenario: Stream similarity scores for thousands of chunks and keep the best 10.
items.explanation: A priority queue (min-heap of size 10) keeps the top-k without sorting everything.
